question: For the `StringWrapper` class (from Q20, managing dynamic C-style string), implement the copy assignment operator (`operator=`). Ensure it handles self-assignment correctly and performs a deep copy of the managed C-style string to prevent resource leaks and double-free issues.

test_cases.input: StringWrapper s1("Hello"); StringWrapper s2("World"); s1 = s2;
StringWrapper s4("Short"); StringWrapper s5("VeryLongString"); s4 = s5;
StringWrapper s6("AnotherLongString"); StringWrapper s7("Tiny"); s6 = s7;
StringWrapper s8("A"); StringWrapper s9("B"); StringWrapper s10("C"); s8 = s9 = s10;
test_cases.expected:
s8: C
s9: C
s10: C

errors: Missing semicolon after return statement in StringWrapper::operator=.
